programmes.show_description: Court TV's team of world class journalists break down the day's breaking news stories and preview the next day's court docket.
Every weekday night on Court TV, Vinnie Politan takes a deep dive into the True Crime stories that are captivating the nation. Now, you can catch the sharp analysis and insightful interviews.
FL v. AILEEN WUORNOS
FL v. AILEEN WUORNOS
FL v. AILEEN WUORNOS
FL v. AILEEN WUORNOS
Court TV's team of world class journalists break down the day's breaking news stories and preview the next day's court docket.
Every weekday night on Court TV, Vinnie Politan takes a deep dive into the True Crime stories that are captivating the nation. Now, you can catch the sharp analysis and insightful interviews.
In the aftermath of the Rodney King Trial and L.A. Riots, police brutality takes center stage again, when a white LAPD police officer fatally shoots a unarmed black tow truck driver.
A prominent businessman is brutally murdered, and his girlfriend becomes the main suspect in the investigation.  But was she the only one who wanted him dead?
A local sheriff loses his re-election campaign and ends up on trial for the murder of the man who beat him.  How far will someone would go to cover up corruption?
A woman opens her front door and ends up dead. Now what started as a delivery of flowers, has turned into a global manhunt for a murderer but are they chasing the right person?
A young woman was found floating in a river, bound in nautical rope.  Now her ex-boyfriend, a charter boat captain, finds himself in hot water for her murder.
...With Vinnie Politan. The series looks beyond the usual suspects to bring you the gripping stories of everyday people caught up in a world of deception and manipulation as they become accomplices.
Your Front Row Seat to Justice. Taking you beyond the headlines and into the courtroom, with in-depth legal reporting and expert analysis of the most important and compelling trials.

The mystery surrounding the death of little Caylee Anthony gripped the nation. Was she the victim of her neglectful, party girl mother Casey, or was a darker family secret to blame?
The discovery of Travis Alexander's body shocked his friends and family. What didn't shock them was when Arizona police charged his on-again off-again girlfriend Jodi Arias with his murder.
Mark Sievers thought he planned the perfect murder when he hired a childhood friend and another man to murder his wife. His plan started falling apart when someone he trusted the most turned on him.
Years after being found not guilty of murder, O.J. Simpson was back in court facing felony charges. Was this a legitimate prosecution or just an attempt to punish Simpson for the sins of his past?
...With Vinnie Politan. The series looks beyond the usual suspects to bring you the gripping stories of everyday people caught up in a world of deception and manipulation as they become accomplices.
Your Front Row Seat to Justice. Taking you beyond the headlines and into the courtroom, with in-depth legal reporting and expert analysis of the most important and compelling trials.
